name: Delicious Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the margarine and flour until well combined.
2. Add the chopped walnuts to the mixture. Stir until incorporated.
3. Spread the batter into an ungreased 9 by 13 inch baking pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes. Allow to cool completely.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the cream cheese and confectioner's sugar until smooth.
6. Fold in the Cool Whip until well combined.
7. Spread the mixture evenly over the cooled crust.
8. Mix the vanilla and butterscotch pudding mixes with milk until semi-set.
9. Spread the pudding on top of the crust and cream cheese mixture.
10. Top with additional Cool Whip and remaining chopped walnuts for garnish.
11. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.
